title: Smoky Meat Hash
description: A hearty breakfast dish made with smoky meat and crispy hash browns.
instructions: 1. Chop the onion and sauté in a pan with 1 tbsp of oil until softened.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the Canadian bacon and cook until browned.
4. Add the smoked paprika and stir to combine.
5. Hash the cooked bacon and onion mixture with a spatula.
6. Shape the mixture into a square and press down to flatten.
7. Place under the broiler for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
8. Meanwhile, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of oil in a pan and fry the hash browns until crispy.
9. Serve the smoky meat hash with the crispy hash browns on top.
